channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: AI Startup Backed by Nvidia Plans to Take on China's DeepSeek
item.description: Reflection, an AI startup supported by chip manufacturer Nvidia, is currently in discussions to raise $2.5 billion at a valuation of $25 billion, with plans to take on China's open source approach to artificial intelligence popularized by DeepSeek. The post A… [Intel, Nvidia]

item.title: Alphabet (GOOGL) Stock Dips Modestly as Investors Eye AI Spending and Q1 Earnings
item.description: Alphabet Inc. shares traded lower in early Thursday trading, pulling back from recent levels as Wall Street digested the tech giant's strong fourth-quarter performance and ambitious plans for heavy artificial intelligence investments in 2026. [Alphabet, Intel]

item.title: ARK Invest sees AI infrastructure market nearing $1.5 trillion by 2030

item.title: Inside Meta’s chaotic AI boomtown in rural Louisiana
item.description: Meta’s massive AI data center in rural Louisiana is reshaping a community — offering an early look at the economic, political, and human impact of the AI infrastructure boom. [Meta]
